bindings.timeline_intro: Use this layout for a clean sequence of key events or milestones.
bindings.event_1_body: A short explanation of the first point in the sequence.
bindings.event_2_body: Useful context that explains what changed next.
bindings.event_3_body: Another key moment, result, decision, or update.
bindings.event_4_body: A concise ending point or current status.
bindings.ranking_intro: Compact layout for ordered top-ten results.

bindings.bottom_note: Use this when the sequence matters more than detail.
bindings.body_text:
• Bullet point one shows the main idea
• Bullet point two gives useful context
• Bullet point three adds a clear takeaway
bindings.quote_text: A clear quote can carry the whole slide when the surrounding design stays quiet.
bindings.left_body:
Lower participation
Less visible trend
Harder to compare
bindings.right_body:
Higher participation
Clearer trend
Easy side-by-side read
